name: Earthbound Resonance
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>縛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>共</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>振</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a monster(s) that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 of them; each player takes damage equal to half its ATK. When your DARK Synchro Monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck is targeted for an attack: You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it. You can only use each effect of "Earthbound Resonance" once per turn.
eff: If a monster(s) that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 of them; each player takes damage equal to half its ATK. When your DARK Synchro Monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck is targeted for an attack: You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it. You can only use each effect of "Earthbound Resonance" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Activates if targeted for an attack
